flare.banner: Flare mode — we're keeping it light. Your streak is protected.
flare.sectionBody: During a flare, the app lightens logging and protects your streak. Turn it on whenever you need it.

home.noNormalYet: Keep documenting to establish your normal
home.scoreEmpty: Not enough data yet for the chart
home.recentEmpty: Your first entries will show up here. Tap “+” to start.

streak.body: Your record grows with every day you note. A single action is enough.
streak.zero: Log an entry today to start your streak.
streak.frozen: Your streak is protected during your flare. ❄️
streak.graceAvailable: Missing one day this week won't break your streak.
streak.graceUsed: You've already caught up one day this week.

settings.title: Settings
settings.restoreConfirmBody: Your current data will be replaced by the file's contents. This cannot be undone.
settings.privacyBody: Everything is stored on your device. Your data and its export will stay free forever.
settings.disclaimer: Crohnicle is a personal tracking tool, not a medical device.
